notes: Carey complete and cover now include a LoRA strength slider when Use LoRA is enabled, letting you blend selected adapters from 0.00 to 1.00.
The slider sends lora_scale to both the remote Carey backend and supported gary4local v0.1.6 backends, defaulting to full strength so existing LoRA results are unchanged.
Additional editor lifecycle hardening improves stability when rapidly opening and closing the plugin UI, including during in-flight backend requests.
Close your DAW before replacing plugin files with a downloaded update.
